mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_thread( board_id, user_id, title, content, thread_type, cover_image_path, view_count, reply_count, like_count, is_top, is_essence, status, last_reply_time, created_at ) VALUES( #{boardId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{threadType}, #{coverImagePath}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_thread WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.status = 1
SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.status = 1

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_thread SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE forum_thread SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
UPDATE forum_thread SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_thread SET last_reply_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id WHERE t.board_id = #{boardId} AND t.status = 1 AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY t.is_top DESC, t.last_reply_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_thread WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_thread WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND status = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_thread SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_thread SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 AND (t.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_thread WHERE status = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 ORDER BY (t.view_count + t.reply_count * 10) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 ORDER BY (t.view_count + t.reply_count * 10) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 AND t.is_essence = 1 ORDER BY t.last_reply_time DESC, t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.status = 1 AND t.is_essence = 1 ORDER BY t.last_reply_time DESC, t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar_path as avatar_path, u.avatar_path as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT t.*, u.nickname as authorName, u.avatar as avatar_path, u.avatar as authorAvatar, b.name as boardName FROM forum_thread t LEFT JOIN forum_user_profile u ON t.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN forum_board b ON t.board_id = b.id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_thread WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
